column1: # BOGA lane registry — the single source for test lanes.
# Consumed by ./boga (gates, `test --list`, `test <lane>`); lane names here ARE
# the timing-record lane names (docs/testing/timings/records/) and the names the
# docs cite. Keep docs/specs/02-quality-and-test-gates.md's matrix in sync with
# this file in the same change.
#   gate:  fast-frontend | fast-backend | fast-repo | slow-backend | slow-frontend | extra
#          (extra = not part of any gate aggregate; run by name)
#   cwd:   working directory relative to the repo root
#   ROW ORDER IS EXECUTION ORDER within a gate.
